'''Stieg Wa''' was a transport [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

He was described as young, brash and confident. He grew up alone and prospered in treacherous adventures.

He was later approached by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and agreed to transport [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Xanatos]] to [[Telos IV]]. During the journey, he made a number of personal attacks on Xanatos, about him being sheltered in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] and knowing nothing of real life. Then, while crossing the [[Landor system/Legends|Landor system]], they were ringed by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ships, who ordered Wa to surrender. Stieg refused, however, and managed to escape, skillfully dodging blaster fire.

After the skirmish, Wa blamed Xanatos for sabotaging the ships [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking system]]. While repairing the device on the ship's dorsal platform, the pirates returned. Stieg was hit by blaster fire and captured.

Afterwords, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tahl]] was sent to apprehend the pirates who abducted Wa.
